summary: Request org-level cost policy enforcement: forbid premium model routing in scheduled/background jobs; require cost receipt fields on loop runner cycles.
requested_controls: forbidden_models and forbidden_providers denylist in data/cost_policy_machine.json
CI scanner scripts/cost_policy_scan.py on push and pull_request
runtime routing guard scripts/runtime_routing_guard.py at worker/kernel entry
loop runner meter_cost must emit estimated_cost, cost_policy_pass, cost_policy_version
scope: noetfeld-OS repo + org GHA workflows (read-only audit)
follow_up: merge PR #24 after scanner PASS; keep fleet_rollout and main_write blocked
